# Junyi Bags

> All-over print custom bag manufacturer based in Baigou, Hebei, China. Specializing in sublimation printing for fully customized bags with edge-to-edge designs. Small-batch MOQs, sample development in 7-15 days. Serving brands across North America, Europe, and Russia.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.junyibags.com/): Company overview and printing capabilities
- [Products](https://www.junyibags.com/products): Custom printed bag catalog
- [Custom Service](https://www.junyibags.com/custom-service): Printing and private-label customization workflow
- [Factory](https://www.junyibags.com/factory): Production line and factory capability
- [About](https://www.junyibags.com/about): Company background and bag manufacturing support
- [Contact](https://www.junyibags.com/contact): Inquiry and quote requests

## Blog

- [Sublimation vs Screen Printing for Bags](https://www.junyibags.com/blog/sublimation-vs-screen-printing-bags): Comparison of printing methods for custom bag designs

## Company Facts

- Location: Baigou, Hebei Province, China
- Specialty: All-over print / sublimation printing bags
- MOQ: Small batch friendly, from 50 units
- Sample lead time: 7-15 days
- Markets: North America, Europe, Russia
